prompt: Create a dreamy vertical 9:16 cinematic 3D social-media creator portrait set in a pastel sunset sky above soft pink clouds. A young woman influencer, HANIA AI, is seated sideways on the edge of a glossy floating metallic platform, seen from behind in a three-quarter view, holding a smartphone that shows an Instagram-like profile screen. Her face is intentionally obscured with a smooth neutral blur rectangle, while her long wavy dark brown hair falls over a pale pink and white hoodie. The hoodie has raised embossed back text reading “HANIA AI”. She wears coordinated pastel pink cargo joggers with strap details and pink-and-white sneakers, relaxed pose with one leg bent on the platform and one foot hanging down. Behind her, place a huge glowing 3D Instagram-style app logo in a pink-orange-purple gradient with rounded corners and neon rim lighting, towering like a futuristic sign. Surround the scene with exactly 12 floating social UI elements: 1 red like notification bubble with a white heart and number “1”, 1 red comment bubble, 1 pale square comment icon, 1 glossy reels/video icon cube, 1 translucent follower card reading “Followers 100K”, 4 circular avatar story thumbnails along the lower left edge, and 3 thin white outline navigation icons along the lower right/center area for bookmark, paper-plane share, and app navigation. Add a bottom floating nameplate plaque beneath the platform with glowing text “HANIA AI” and subtitle “Digital Creator”. Use soft volumetric clouds, sparkles, lens glow, warm rim light, reflective chrome edges, pink lavender orange color palette, high-detail semi-realistic 3D render, polished influencer branding aesthetic, shallow depth of field, ultra-clean composition, no extra readable text besides the specified labels.
